description: You are a data quality engineer responsible for maintaining the Emoncms energy monitoring system at http://localhost (admin/admin). A routine integrity check has flagged that several input and feed configurations are broken, causing data to be silently dropped or incorrectly stored. Investigate the configuration of the existing inputs and feeds, identify all problems, and correct them so that data flows correctly. You do not need to add new inputs or feeds — only correct existing configuration errors.
